items.title: Install and verify OCI Hermes/gallery runner on Oracle VM
items.notes: Automation is built in repo; value is not realized until VM install, env configuration, rclone setup, and first receipt are confirmed.

items.title: Populate approved gallery source with safe project photos
items.notes: Project Gallery currently falls back when no approved manifest images exist. Approved photos create immediate trust lift.

items.title: Run RFQ and dispatch end-to-end receipt tests
items.notes: Submit test RFQ and dispatch with attachment; verify dispatch mailbox, requester receipt, JSON record, and file delivery.

items.title: Run SOCRATES against live source after OCI runner starts
items.notes: Confirms current source has no overclaims, broken routes, or secret literals and writes receipt.

items.title: Add structured captions and categories for approved gallery photos
items.notes: Improves gallery interpretation once real approved photos exist.
